INSPECTEXOFULLACCESS: Checks that Exchange FullAccess mailbox delegation is controlled.
INSPECTEXOSENDASPERMISSIONS: Checks that Exchange SendAs delegation is controlled.
INSPECTEXOSENDONBEHALFOF: Checks that Exchange SendOnBehalfOf delegation is controlled.
INSPECTLARGEATTACHMENTBLOCKINGRULE: Checks that large attachment blocking rules are in place when required.
INSPECTMAILBOXESWITHINTERNALFORWARDING: Checks that mailbox forwarding rules are controlled.
